modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Device lost network connection after power event or maintenance.

full_description_text:  
I noticed that my device is offline and can't connect to the network anymore. This happened after a power blip or maybe after some maintenance was done. It's really frustrating because it was working fine before!
short_description: Device lost network connection after power event or maintenance.
description: I noticed that my device is offline and can't connect to the network anymore. This happened after a power blip or maybe after some maintenance was done. It's really frustrating because it was working fine before!
